title: Golaghat British Cemetery
tagline: Golaghat British Cemetery — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: The Golaghat British Cemetery is a cemetery located on the premises opposite to Cally Coomer Doss & Co., adjacent to the circle office of Assam Power Distribution Company Limited a
overview.description: The Golaghat British Cemetery is a cemetery located on the premises opposite to Cally Coomer Doss & Co., adjacent to the circle office of Assam Power Distribution Company Limited at Golaghat, Assam, India. It is Assam's one of the oldest burial grounds dating back to India's pre-independence era, containing 28 burials of British officers of tea estates and their families, and is open for public viewing. The oldest grave in the cemetery is that of Capt. John Butler, then political agent who died at the age of 33 on 7 January 1876.

topPlaces.name: Golaghat
topPlaces.description: Golaghat (English: Gʊlaɡʱat ['ɡʊlaɡʱat] ), the 3rd largest subdivision of the Indian state of Assam, later elevated to the position of a full–fledged district headquarter on 5 October 1987, is a city and a municipality and the seat of administrative operations of Golaghat district, besides being a twin city to Jorhat which is about 55 km away. It is one of the oldest urban areas in Assam that recently featured on the Smart Cities nominations list, along with Guwahati and four other prominent urban areas of the state; although losing out to Guwahati at the final stage.

topPlaces.name: Golaghat Baptist Church
topPlaces.description: The Golaghat Baptist Church is a Baptist Church in Assam located in the city of Golaghat, India. It is affiliated with the Assam Baptist Convention.

It is one of the oldest urban areas in Assam that recently featured on the Smart Cities nominations list, along with Guwahati and four other prominent urban areas of the state; although losing out to Guwahati at the final stage.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Golaghat British Cemetery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Golaghat British Cemetery is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Golaghat British Cemetery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Golaghat British Cemetery?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Golaghat British Cemetery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Golaghat British Cemetery?
faq.a: Stays in Golaghat British Cemetery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Golaghat British Cemetery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Golaghat, Golaghat Baptist Church.
